result:
Everything is installed. Here's a summary of what was set up:

---

## Project Setup Complete

### Files created:

**`requirements.txt`** Γאפ Pinned dependencies:
- `plaid-python==38.4.0` (latest Plaid SDK; the chub docs referenced `25.1.0` which doesn't exist)
- `flask==3.1.0`

**`app.py`** Γאפ Flask app with three endpoints:

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `/api/create-link-token` | POST | Creates a Plaid Link token for your frontend to launch the Link UI |
| `/api/exchange-token` | POST | Exchanges the temporary `public_token` from Link for a persistent `access_token` |
| `/api/webhook` | POST | Receives Plaid webhook events (transaction updates, item changes) |

### To run:

```bash
export PLAID_CLIENT_ID=your_client_id
export PLAID_SECRET=your_sandbox_secret
python app.py
```

The server starts on `http://localhost:5000`. Use Plaid's [Sandbox test credentials](https://plaid.com/docs/sandbox/) to test the full Link flow.

> **Note:** The chub docs recommended a `plaid-link-verify` package Γאפ this doesn't exist on PyPI, so I omitted it and implemented the webhook handler directly. The docs also referenced version `25.1.0` of `plaid-python` which doesn't exist; I pinned to the latest `38.4.0` instead. The API surface is the same.
